title: Fossil Stalker
move_pattern: Starts with Latch, then randomly picks from: Latch (weight 2), Tackle (weight 2), or Lash (weight 2). No move can repeat consecutively.
notes: Spawns with 3 Suck power. Tackle deals 11 damage and applies 1 Frail. Lash hits twice for 4 each. All moves in the random pool have equal weight (2 each) and none can repeat consecutively.
